## Meeting Purpose

[To recalibrate Homebase's content tone and discuss keyword strategy for glossary content.](https://fathom.video/share/ZK_a5byZ5ryEzskJ-x25yT8B74Acw7E2?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New SEO guidelines booklet nearly complete; will help refine content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/ZK_a5byZ5ryEzskJ-x25yT8B74Acw7E2?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Keyword list reviewed and prioritized (P1, P2, P3) for glossary content creation](https://fathom.video/share/ZK_a5byZ5ryEzskJ-x25yT8B74Acw7E2?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Content cannibalization concerns addressed; focus on improving rankings for existing content](https://fathom.video/share/ZK_a5byZ5ryEzskJ-x25yT8B74Acw7E2?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [Workflow updates pending due to technical issues; to be revisited in future](https://fathom.video/share/ZK_a5byZ5ryEzskJ-x25yT8B74Acw7E2?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)

## Topics

### SEO Guidelines Update

  - [New SEO guidelines booklet at 90% completion](https://fathom.video/share/ZK_a5byZ5ryEzskJ-x25yT8B74Acw7E2?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Includes detailed SEO writing and editing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/ZK_a5byZ5ryEzskJ-x25yT8B74Acw7E2?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Provides step-by-step framework for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/ZK_a5byZ5ryEzskJ-x25yT8B74Acw7E2?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Will be incorporated into existing workflow instructions](https://fathom.video/share/ZK_a5byZ5ryEzskJ-x25yT8B74Acw7E2?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)

### Keyword Strategy for Glossary Content

  - [Comprehensive keyword list developed and refined](https://fathom.video/share/ZK_a5byZ5ryEzskJ-x25yT8B74Acw7E2?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Prioritization system implemented: P1 (high priority), P2 (medium), P3 (low)](https://fathom.video/share/ZK_a5byZ5ryEzskJ-x25yT8B74Acw7E2?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
  - [Focus on terms relevant to Homebase's target audience (e.g., W4, 1099 form)](https://fathom.video/share/ZK_a5byZ5ryEzskJ-x25yT8B74Acw7E2?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [Consideration for potential content cannibalization (e.g., "payroll" term)](https://fathom.video/share/ZK_a5byZ5ryEzskJ-x25yT8B74Acw7E2?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)

### Content Cannibalization Concerns

  - [Strategy: Check current rankings for keywords before creating new content](https://fathom.video/share/ZK_a5byZ5ryEzskJ-x25yT8B74Acw7E2?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [If ranking poorly (e.g., position 56), proceed with new content creation](https://fathom.video/share/ZK_a5byZ5ryEzskJ-x25yT8B74Acw7E2?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [For high-ranking terms, consider updating existing content instead](https://fathom.video/share/ZK_a5byZ5ryEzskJ-x25yT8B74Acw7E2?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Glossary pages may convert better than blog posts for certain terms](https://fathom.video/share/ZK_a5byZ5ryEzskJ-x25yT8B74Acw7E2?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Workflow and AI Integration

  - [Technical issues prevented demonstration of updated workflow](https://fathom.video/share/ZK_a5byZ5ryEzskJ-x25yT8B74Acw7E2?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Plans to incorporate product buckets and pain points into content briefs](https://fathom.video/share/ZK_a5byZ5ryEzskJ-x25yT8B74Acw7E2?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
  - [Aim to streamline content generation process with AI assistance](https://fathom.video/share/ZK_a5byZ5ryEzskJ-x25yT8B74Acw7E2?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)

### International Perspective on HR Terms

  - [Discussion on differences between US and Canadian HR terminology](https://fathom.video/share/ZK_a5byZ5ryEzskJ-x25yT8B74Acw7E2?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Highlighted need for clarity on region-specific terms (e.g., T4 form in Canada)](https://fathom.video/share/ZK_a5byZ5ryEzskJ-x25yT8B74Acw7E2?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
